title: Invest Data Holds Q4 Master Class Saturday, Reports 47.05% Average Returns
description: Ahead of its Q4 virtual Master Class scheduled for Saturday, September 30, 2023, at 9 am Investdata Consulting Limited, at the weekend said its five golden stocks recommended for participants during t
html:
Ahead of its Q4 virtual Master Class scheduled for Saturday, September 30, 2023, at 9 am Investdata Consulting Limited, at the weekend said its five golden stocks recommended for participants during the Q1, Q2 and Q3 edition returned 56.47% on the average as of Friday, September 22, 2023.

The selected stocks namely: NAHCO Aviance, AXA Mansard Insurance, e-Tranzact, Consolidated Hallmark Insurance and Transcorp, the company said in a statement, outperformed inflation for the period and NGX year to date return.

According to the latest data from the National Bureau of Statistics (NBS), inflation for the month of August surged to 25.80%

Details of the performance by the five stocks recommended by participants in the Investdata Master Class, showed that The Transnational Corporation Plc yielded the juiciest returns on investment of 97.5%, after its price soared to N6.32 on September 22, from N3.20 on June 30. It reached a peak of N7.71 each within the period; and was followed by e-Tranzact with 56.98% from N6.02 to N9.45, after attaining a peak of N10.58; ahead of Consolidated Hallmark’s 36.36% ROI, as it closed at N1.05 from 77 kobo reaching a height of N1.41 for the period.

Investors in NAHCO within the period raked 36.29% ROI, after its price rose from N17.50 before dropping to N23.85, from its N26.95 peak; while Mansard returned the least at 8.11% from N3.70 to N4.00 each, attaining N4.22 per share.

Recall that in Q2, Investdata stock picks returned an average of 109.36%, with three of the five selected equities yielding three-digit returns as of June 30, 2023.

While Transcorp recorded 192.5% gain, as its price jumped from N1.20 on March 31, 2023 to N3.51 per share, touching a height of N3.87 within the period; followed by NAHCO’s 151.72% after its share price grew from N7.25 to N18.25, the highest for the period. PZ Cussons, another of the recommended stocks for the period, achieved 108.73%; ahead of Dangote Sugar Refinery’s 61.50%; while Cutix achieved 32.35% returns.

The Q4 Master Class with the theme: “Thriving In A Changing Macroeconomic Climate: Identifying Opportunities, Waves & Paths On NGX,” which will hold via ZOOM, according to Ambrose Omordion, Chief Research Office at Investdata Consulting, is the company’s contribution to knowledgeable investing and trading, specially aimed at restoring and enhancing interest in the Nigerian financial market among retail players.

“During this practical session our top industry experts will reveal profitable trade ideas and opportunities that can help consolidate your gains in Q4 and ride on year-end seasonality to maximise returns. These you can implement immediately to start tracking the result by yourself, or the investdata Research team on your behalf,” he noted.

The Q4 Master Class, like those before it, Omordion said, is for those “interested in learning how to safely navigate the financial market in today’s trading and investing environment that is blunted by uncertainties and surprises that continue to spike volatility across the globe.

“Despite these headwinds, discerning investors and smart traders on the NGX are cashing out high profits with practical strategies of effective combination of fundamentals, technicals and sentiment analysis of the professionals and experts in the market,” he said.

Participants at the Q4 Master Class, he assured, “will learn exact steps in real time using new strategies by following the current volatility and happenings in the market to help you avoid needless losses, while building a profitable portfolio with high ROI, especially in a volatile market.”

Specifically, he said participants will learn strategies to hedge against inflation and preserve capital in sectors and industry with the potential to drive profit that will support equity prices, among others, in addition to recommending five hot stocks that can deliver returns that can give over 50% ROI within a short timeframe.

Confirmed speakers at the Master Class include Alhaji Garba Kurfi, MD/CEO APT Securities & Funds Ltd, who will take participants on “Navigating Market Dynamics: Insights For Profitable Strategies; Mr. Abdul-Rasheed Oshoma Momoh, Head Capital Market at, TRW Stockbrokers Ltd, “Mastering Market Volatility: Chart & Analysis For Higher Returns; the Power of Macroeconomic Data In Equities’ Trading & Investing, will be handled by Mr. Olatunde Amolegbe, MD/CEO, Arthur Steven Asset Management Ltd; while Mr. Omordion will take participants through “Understanding The Link Between Fundamental, Technical and Sentiment Analysis In Picking Stocks.”

To become one of the smart traders and investors in Q4, the statement urged interested participants to send YES to 08028164085 and 08179547605.
